SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Administrator
Represents an administrator in the system.
AISummaryService
 
App
Main application class for running the appointment booking system.
Appointment
Represents an appointment in the system.
AppointmentGUI
Supports two roles Admin (full access) and User (limited access) After login automatically navigates to Available Slots Admin username: admin password: admin123 User username: user password: user123
AppointmentRepository
Repository interface for managing appointments.
AppointmentService
Interface for appointment management operations.
AppointmentServiceImpl
Implementation of the AppointmentService interface.
AppointmentType
Enum representing all supported appointment types
AppointmentTypeRule
Interface for type specific booking rules Each appointment type has its own rule implementation
AssessmentAppointmentRule
Rule for assessment appointments Max duration 120 minutes, max 3 participants
AuthService
Interface for authentication operations.
BookingRuleStrategy
A simple interface that every booking rule must follow We use this so we can add new rules later without touching the booking logic Each rule just needs to say whether an appointment is valid or not
DurationRule
Makes sure no appointment lasts longer than 2 hours Anything over 120 minutes gets rejected
FollowUpAppointmentRule
Rule for follow-up appointments Max duration 60 minutes, max 2 participants
GroupAppointmentRule
Rule for group appointments Max duration 120 minutes, between 3 and 5 participants
IndividualAppointmentRule
Rule for individual appointments Max duration 60 minutes, exactly 1 participant
InMemoryAppointmentRepository
In-memory implementation of the AppointmentRepository interface.
InPersonAppointmentRule
Rule for in person appointments Max duration 60 minutes max 3 participants
NotificationObserver
This is the observer that actually does something when notified It receives the event and passes it to the NotificationService to handle the sending This way we keep the what happened separate from how we tell people
NotificationService
Defines how notifications get sent out.
Observer
Anyone who wants to receive appointment notifications must implement this it is like subscribing to updates, when something happens everyone on the list gets the message
ParticipantLimitRule
Makes sure no appointment has more than 5 participants If someone tries to book with 6 or more people, we reject it
SimpleAuthService
Simple implementation of the AuthService interface.
TimeSlot
Represents a specific time slot for appointments.
UrgentAppointmentRule
Rule for urgent appointments Max duration 30 minutes, max 2 participants
User
Represents a user in the system.
VirtualAppointmentRule
Rule for virtual appointments.
